name: railway-track-qr-system
description: AI-based Laser QR Code marking system for Indian Railways track fittings

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run server" "npm run client" "npm run decision-copilot"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd server && npm install && cd ../client && npm install && cd ../ai-service && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../"Decision Copilot" && npm install

author: Railway Track QR Team
